questionSubtitle: Select an option that matches your property needs.
buyPropertyDesc: Browse exclusive listings and find your dream home or investment.
sellPropertyDesc: Get a free valuation and list your property to reach qualified buyers.
rentOutPropertyDesc: Find reliable tenants and manage your rental portfolio efficiently.
findRentalPropertyDesc: Discover the perfect rental home in your desired neighborhood.

buyer.title: Find Your Dream Property
buyer.subtitle: Tell us your requirements and our team will help you find the perfect property.
buyer.personalInfoDesc: Tell us how we can contact you.
buyer.propertyRequirementsDesc: Tell us what you're looking for.

seller.title: Sell Your Property Faster
seller.subtitle: Share your property details and connect with serious buyers quickly.
seller.personalInfoDesc: Tell us how we can contact you.
seller.propertyDetailsDesc: Tell us about the property you want to sell.
seller.additionalDetailsDesc: Provide more information about your property.
seller.additionalDetailsPlaceholder: 3BHK, Parking, Furnished, Corner Property, Near Market...
seller.mediaDesc: Upload property photos and a video.

landlord.title: Find Verified Tenants
landlord.subtitle: Share your property details and we'll connect you with suitable tenants.
landlord.personalInfoDesc: Tell us how we can contact you.
landlord.propertyDetailsDesc: Tell us about the property you want to rent.
landlord.mediaDesc: Upload property photos and a video.

tenant.title: Find Your Next Rental Home
tenant.subtitle: Tell us your requirements and we'll help you find the perfect rental property.
tenant.personalInfoDesc: Tell us how we can contact you.
tenant.currentAddressDesc: Tell us where you're currently staying.
tenant.requirementsDesc: Tell us what kind of property you're looking for.
tenant.additionalRequirementsPlaceholder: Furnished, Parking, Near Office, Family Friendly, Pet Friendly...

packages.title: Choose Your Package
packages.subtitle: Select the package that best matches your property requirements.
packages.needHelpDesc: Talk to our property consultant and we'll help you select the right plan.

payment.title: Complete Your Payment
payment.subtitle: Secure your package and get started with FutureNest services.
payment.scanQrDesc: Scan the QR code using any UPI app.
payment.step1: Scan QR or pay via UPI ID
payment.verificationDesc: After completing the payment, send us the screenshot on WhatsApp for manual verification.
payment.whatsappMessage:
Hello FutureNest Team,

I have completed the payment.

Package:
payment.verificationLine: I am attaching the payment screenshot for verification.

success.title: Thank You!
success.description: Your requirement has been submitted successfully. Our team will review your details and contact you shortly.
